The screen shows the 'Coverage & Guidelines' workspace with the mobile menu in an OPEN state.

Visual Style: Premium healthcare SaaS, white pill-shaped chrome, navy text (#071252), vibrant orange (#f47a45) and cobalt blue actions, mint verification accents. Soft healthcare operations background (hospital/coding center) visible behind translucent layers.

Header: Compact white pill-shaped bar with a menu icon, a small 'Status: Active' pill, and a user profile avatar.

Mobile Menu (Open): A premium slide-over drawer or floating sheet. It includes the Codical logo, grouped navigation links (Dashboard, Claims, Intelligence - Active, Reports, Settings), a prominent '+ New Claim' button in orange, and a 'Logout' footer. Icons are solid and modern, not just outlines.

Main Workspace (Visible behind/below menu):
- Title: 'Real-Time Coding Validation'
- Navigation Chips: Horizontally scrollable chips for 'LCD/NCD Search', 'ICD to CPT', 'CPT to ICD', 'NCCI Checks'.
- Data Cards: A stacked list of clinical validation cards. Each card shows an ICD code (e.g., M17.0), a description, an NCCI warning status with an icon, and a confidence percentage (e.g., 95% AI Match).
- Actions: A floating 'Apply All Validations' action at the bottom.

Everything is meticulously sized for 390px with no horizontal overflow. Use the established design system tokens.","name":"projects/4424618916363041938/screens/d4ab0bdedeac4decaed2dcb454f9dc47","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","roundness":"ROUND_TWELVE","customColor":"#f47a45","headlineFont":"MANROPE","bodyFont":"INTER","labelFont":"INTER","designMd":"# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

Purpose: Create a Codical Health landing page that reaches or exceeds the polish level of the Automation SaaS/Nexsas reference at https://automation-saas-tailwind.vercel.app/. Use the reference for layout quality, page rhythm, hero scale, header behavior, product mockup depth, CTA style, and premium polish only. Do not copy Nexsas branding, exact assets, exact copy, or source code.

Product: Codical Health helps healthcare coding teams upload clinical reports, receive AI-assisted ICD/CPT/HCPCS suggestions, validate claims with NCCI/payer/NPI checks, and complete certified coder review in one professional workflow.

Design personality: bright, cinematic, spacious, premium SaaS, healthcare operations, clean editorial, confident. It should feel at least as expensive as the reference, with a healthcare-specific hero environment and real product UI.

Hero direction:
- Full-bleed scenic healthcare operations background, inspired by the reference's sky/mountain hero but translated to Codical: morning clinical campus, bright sky, glass medical operations center, or clean healthcare command environment.
- Floating pill header over the hero with logo, dropdown nav, and primary CTA.
- Huge centered headline, short readable subcopy, avatar proof row, two CTA pill buttons.
- Large Codical product mockup overlapping the hero bottom with soft fade into next section.
- Product mockup must show Codical-specific UI: claim validation workspace, CPT/ICD table, NCCI status, NPI verified, payer rule attached, coder invite/review action.

Page structure:
1. Header: logo, Platform, Solutions, Resources, Pricing, Request access CTA.
2. Hero: avatar proof, headline, subcopy, Start review workflow, Book demo/See process, product mockup.
3. Editorial about section: healthcare team image, large heading, short copy, stats.
4. Results/features: four premium cards with custom mini visuals for Code Intelligence, Claim Validation, Payer/NCCI Intelligence, Certified Review.
5. Workflow/process: four steps Upload report, Coding suggestions, Validate claim, Certified coder review.
6. Product depth/integrations: connected healthcare ecosystem CMS, NPI/NPPES, payer policy, clearinghouse, EHR.
7. FAQ/final CTA/footer.

Visual tokens:
- Light fog background: #edf4fb, #f7fbff, #ffffff.
- Text: #101828, #17213a, muted #65758b.
- Codical navy: #071252.
- Codical blue: #1238db.
- Codical orange: #ff7a3d / #f47a45.
- Optional electric CTA accent: #c8ff55 used sparingly like the reference, but Codical orange can remain primary.
- Cards: white glass, soft shadows, large but disciplined radii, premium depth.
- Header: white pill with black/dark CTA body and colored circular icon segment.

Responsive requirements:
- Mobile must improve on the reference by avoiding horizontal clipping.
- Headline wraps cleanly at 390px.
- CTAs stack cleanly.
- Product mockup scales without overflow.
- Mobile menu open and closed states should be designed.

Motion notes:
- Slow hero background parallax.
- Product mockup floats/fades in.
- CTA icon hover slide.
- Header blur/shadow on scroll.
- Subtle section reveal.
- Reduced-motion static fallback.","colorVariant":"EXPRESSIVE","overridePrimaryColor":"#f47a45","overrideSecondaryColor":"#1238db","overrideTertiaryColor":"#c8ff55","overrideNeutralColor":"#edf4fb"},"deviceType":"MOBILE","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/7171876461624600483","designSystem":{"displayName":"Codical Reference-Level Landing System","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","roundness":"ROUND_TWELVE","customColor":"#f47a45","headlineFont":"MANROPE","bodyFont":"INTER","labelFont":"INTER","designMd":"# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

### Key Design Decisions:
- **Responsive Navigation Shell**: I replaced the desktop sidebar with a high-fidelity slide-over menu. This maintains access to all platform modules (Claims, Intelligence, Reports) while featuring a prominent orange "New Claim" action, optimized for mobile thumb reach.
- **Clinical Workspace Stacking**: The complex desktop validation table has been re-engineered into a vertical stack of high-density cards. This ensures that ICD descriptions, CPT codes, and AI confidence scores remain legible without horizontal scrolling.
- **Interaction Model**: I introduced horizontally scrollable chips for the various search modes (ICD/CPT crosswalks, NCCI checks), allowing the user to switch context quickly while maintaining a compact vertical footprint.
- **Visual Consistency**: The "white pill" aesthetic and hospital operations backdrop from the landing page are carried forward here, creating a seamless transition from marketing to the authenticated product experience.

Would you like to see the "closed" dashboard state or focus on refining the evidence drawer for mobile?"},{"suggestion":"Show the dashboard menu closed state"},{"suggestion":"Refine the evidence drawer for mobile"},{"suggestion":"Add interactive motion to the menu slide"}]}

theme.designMd:
# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

Purpose: Create a Codical Health landing page that reaches or exceeds the polish level of the Automation SaaS/Nexsas reference at https://automation-saas-tailwind.vercel.app/. Use the reference for layout quality, page rhythm, hero scale, header behavior, product mockup depth, CTA style, and premium polish only. Do not copy Nexsas branding, exact assets, exact copy, or source code.

Product: Codical Health helps healthcare coding teams upload clinical reports, receive AI-assisted ICD/CPT/HCPCS suggestions, validate claims with NCCI/payer/NPI checks, and complete certified coder review in one professional workflow.

Design personality: bright, cinematic, spacious, premium SaaS, healthcare operations, clean editorial, confident. It should feel at least as expensive as the reference, with a healthcare-specific hero environment and real product UI.

Hero direction:
- Full-bleed scenic healthcare operations background, inspired by the reference's sky/mountain hero but translated to Codical: morning clinical campus, bright sky, glass medical operations center, or clean healthcare command environment.
- Floating pill header over the hero with logo, dropdown nav, and primary CTA.
- Huge centered headline, short readable subcopy, avatar proof row, two CTA pill buttons.
- Large Codical product mockup overlapping the hero bottom with soft fade into next section.
- Product mockup must show Codical-specific UI: claim validation workspace, CPT/ICD table, NCCI status, NPI verified, payer rule attached, coder invite/review action.

Page structure:
1. Header: logo, Platform, Solutions, Resources, Pricing, Request access CTA.
2. Hero: avatar proof, headline, subcopy, Start review workflow, Book demo/See process, product mockup.
3. Editorial about section: healthcare team image, large heading, short copy, stats.
4. Results/features: four premium cards with custom mini visuals for Code Intelligence, Claim Validation, Payer/NCCI Intelligence, Certified Review.
5. Workflow/process: four steps Upload report, Coding suggestions, Validate claim, Certified coder review.
6. Product depth/integrations: connected healthcare ecosystem CMS, NPI/NPPES, payer policy, clearinghouse, EHR.
7. FAQ/final CTA/footer.

Visual tokens:
- Light fog background: #edf4fb, #f7fbff, #ffffff.
- Text: #101828, #17213a, muted #65758b.
- Codical navy: #071252.
- Codical blue: #1238db.
- Codical orange: #ff7a3d / #f47a45.
- Optional electric CTA accent: #c8ff55 used sparingly like the reference, but Codical orange can remain primary.
- Cards: white glass, soft shadows, large but disciplined radii, premium depth.
- Header: white pill with black/dark CTA body and colored circular icon segment.

Responsive requirements:
- Mobile must improve on the reference by avoiding horizontal clipping.
- Headline wraps cleanly at 390px.
- CTAs stack cleanly.
- Product mockup scales without overflow.
- Mobile menu open and closed states should be designed.

Motion notes:
- Slow hero background parallax.
- Product mockup floats/fades in.
- CTA icon hover slide.
- Header blur/shadow on scroll.
- Subtle section reveal.
- Reduced-motion static fallback.

screens.name: projects/4424618916363041938/screens/d4ab0bdedeac4decaed2dcb454f9dc47
screens.prompt:
A mobile authenticated dashboard for Codical Health (390x844). 

The screen shows the 'Coverage & Guidelines' workspace with the mobile menu in an OPEN state.

Visual Style: Premium healthcare SaaS, white pill-shaped chrome, navy text (#071252), vibrant orange (#f47a45) and cobalt blue actions, mint verification accents. Soft healthcare operations background (hospital/coding center) visible behind translucent layers.

Header: Compact white pill-shaped bar with a menu icon, a small 'Status: Active' pill, and a user profile avatar.

Mobile Menu (Open): A premium slide-over drawer or floating sheet. It includes the Codical logo, grouped navigation links (Dashboard, Claims, Intelligence - Active, Reports, Settings), a prominent '+ New Claim' button in orange, and a 'Logout' footer. Icons are solid and modern, not just outlines.

Main Workspace (Visible behind/below menu):
- Title: 'Real-Time Coding Validation'
- Navigation Chips: Horizontally scrollable chips for 'LCD/NCD Search', 'ICD to CPT', 'CPT to ICD', 'NCCI Checks'.
- Data Cards: A stacked list of clinical validation cards. Each card shows an ICD code (e.g., M17.0), a description, an NCCI warning status with an icon, and a confidence percentage (e.g., 95% AI Match).
- Actions: A floating 'Apply All Validations' action at the bottom.

Everything is meticulously sized for 390px with no horizontal overflow. Use the established design system tokens.

theme.designMd:
# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

Purpose: Create a Codical Health landing page that reaches or exceeds the polish level of the Automation SaaS/Nexsas reference at https://automation-saas-tailwind.vercel.app/. Use the reference for layout quality, page rhythm, hero scale, header behavior, product mockup depth, CTA style, and premium polish only. Do not copy Nexsas branding, exact assets, exact copy, or source code.

Product: Codical Health helps healthcare coding teams upload clinical reports, receive AI-assisted ICD/CPT/HCPCS suggestions, validate claims with NCCI/payer/NPI checks, and complete certified coder review in one professional workflow.

Design personality: bright, cinematic, spacious, premium SaaS, healthcare operations, clean editorial, confident. It should feel at least as expensive as the reference, with a healthcare-specific hero environment and real product UI.

Hero direction:
- Full-bleed scenic healthcare operations background, inspired by the reference's sky/mountain hero but translated to Codical: morning clinical campus, bright sky, glass medical operations center, or clean healthcare command environment.
- Floating pill header over the hero with logo, dropdown nav, and primary CTA.
- Huge centered headline, short readable subcopy, avatar proof row, two CTA pill buttons.
- Large Codical product mockup overlapping the hero bottom with soft fade into next section.
- Product mockup must show Codical-specific UI: claim validation workspace, CPT/ICD table, NCCI status, NPI verified, payer rule attached, coder invite/review action.

Page structure:
1. Header: logo, Platform, Solutions, Resources, Pricing, Request access CTA.
2. Hero: avatar proof, headline, subcopy, Start review workflow, Book demo/See process, product mockup.
3. Editorial about section: healthcare team image, large heading, short copy, stats.
4. Results/features: four premium cards with custom mini visuals for Code Intelligence, Claim Validation, Payer/NCCI Intelligence, Certified Review.
5. Workflow/process: four steps Upload report, Coding suggestions, Validate claim, Certified coder review.
6. Product depth/integrations: connected healthcare ecosystem CMS, NPI/NPPES, payer policy, clearinghouse, EHR.
7. FAQ/final CTA/footer.

Visual tokens:
- Light fog background: #edf4fb, #f7fbff, #ffffff.
- Text: #101828, #17213a, muted #65758b.
- Codical navy: #071252.
- Codical blue: #1238db.
- Codical orange: #ff7a3d / #f47a45.
- Optional electric CTA accent: #c8ff55 used sparingly like the reference, but Codical orange can remain primary.
- Cards: white glass, soft shadows, large but disciplined radii, premium depth.
- Header: white pill with black/dark CTA body and colored circular icon segment.

Responsive requirements:
- Mobile must improve on the reference by avoiding horizontal clipping.
- Headline wraps cleanly at 390px.
- CTAs stack cleanly.
- Product mockup scales without overflow.
- Mobile menu open and closed states should be designed.

Motion notes:
- Slow hero background parallax.
- Product mockup floats/fades in.
- CTA icon hover slide.
- Header blur/shadow on scroll.
- Subtle section reveal.
- Reduced-motion static fallback.

screens.title: Codical Health - Mobile Dashboard & Coverage Workspace

outputComponents.text:
I've translated the Codical Health 'Coverage & Guidelines' workspace into a premium mobile dashboard experience.

### Key Design Decisions:
- **Responsive Navigation Shell**: I replaced the desktop sidebar with a high-fidelity slide-over menu. This maintains access to all platform modules (Claims, Intelligence, Reports) while featuring a prominent orange "New Claim" action, optimized for mobile thumb reach.
- **Clinical Workspace Stacking**: The complex desktop validation table has been re-engineered into a vertical stack of high-density cards. This ensures that ICD descriptions, CPT codes, and AI confidence scores remain legible without horizontal scrolling.
- **Interaction Model**: I introduced horizontally scrollable chips for the various search modes (ICD/CPT crosswalks, NCCI checks), allowing the user to switch context quickly while maintaining a compact vertical footprint.
- **Visual Consistency**: The "white pill" aesthetic and hospital operations backdrop from the landing page are carried forward here, creating a seamless transition from marketing to the authenticated product experience.

Would you like to see the "closed" dashboard state or focus on refining the evidence drawer for mobile?

outputComponents.suggestion: Show the dashboard menu closed state
Refine the evidence drawer for mobile
Add interactive motion to the menu slide
